title: HazentouveLib
description: A lib for all of Hazen's mods.
body:
# HazentouveLib

# Disclaimer: This mod does not add any content.

HazentouveLib is a lib used for addon creation.

What HazentouveLib has:

## Schools 'n Spells

```
- 3 schools:
  - Radiance
  - Shadow
  - Cosmic
```

## Entities

```
- AbstractSpellCastingEnderman
  - AbstractSpellCastingEnderManAngerEvent
- AbstractNeutralSpellCastingEnderman
```

## Effects

```
- Hexed
  - Damages you when casting spells.
```

## Items

```
- Armor
  - There are 3 tiers
    - Dormant
    - Pure
    - Ascended
  - Dual: Has 2 school spell powers.
  - Tri: Has 3 school spell powers.
- Magic Maces
  - HLMaceCastingItem
  - HLMaceStaffItem
  - HLImbuableMaceStaffItem
- HLSpawnEggs
```

## Curios
```
- Wing slot
```

## Rarities:

```
- Adds in rarities for each of the schools.
- Fireblossom Rarity
- Hydro Rarity
- Deus Rarity
```

## Technical:

```
- 5 keybinds for 5 abilities
- AbstractTaggedSpell
```

# Try out my other mods:

*   [Hazen 'n Stuff](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hazen-n-stuff)
*   [Elemental Synergies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/elemental-synergies)
*   [Stars Aligned](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stars-align)
*   [Enigmatic Arcana](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enigmatic-arcana)
